summary: Taiki Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, explicitly calling a market bottom and identifying potential catalysts to propel Bitcoin higher.
narrative: After spending late 2025 successfully shorting Ethereum, Maeda's latest analysis suggests the bearish trend has exhausted itself and markets are bottoming. He is now watching STRC as a potential source of marginal buying pressure and advises against 4-Year Cycle Dogma, favoring a framework that identifies accumulation ranges.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
